# Gcore Video Streaming

Live broadcasting via RTMP, RTMPS, SRT, WebRTC WHIP and VOD with transcoding to HLS, DASH, MP4, AES-128 encryption; low-latency LL-HLS and LL-DASH (~2-5s); DVR pause and rewind, multicamera, HTML overlays, recording, restream to YouTube/Facebook/Twitch; broadcasting software (FFmpeg, GStreamer, Larix, OBS); built-in web player and JS Video Player SDK; custom CDN delivery with secure tokens and auto-refresh; AI services for caption generation and translation in 100+ languages, content moderation (NSFW, hard/soft nudity, sport detection); view and live stream statistics.

- [Gcore Video Streaming](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming.md): Gcore Video Streaming is a high-load video streaming PaaS. Scale to 1M+ viewers and beyond

## AI video services
- [AI video services](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/video-hosting/ai-video-service.md): Generate AI subtitles and translate captions for VOD and live streaming; perform content moderation for nudity, violence, and offensive language using Gcore'...

## Content moderation
- [Content moderation](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/ai-video-service/content-moderation.md): Detect NSFW, nudity, and sports activities in video/image content using AI models with configurable probability thresholds for content filtering and personal...
- [Not safe for work (NSFW) detection](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/ai-video-service/content-moderation/nsfw-detection.md): Detect and flag inappropriate video content using NSFW detection task in Gcore Streaming AI with confidence scoring and frame-level analysis.
- [Hard nudity detection](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/ai-video-service/ai-nudity-detection.md): Detect explicit nudity involving genitals in videos using Gcore Streaming AI content moderation with confidence scoring and frame-level results.
- [Soft nudity detection](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/ai-video-service/content-moderation/soft-nudity-detection.md): Detect explicit and partial nudity including faces and uncovered body parts in videos using soft nudity content moderation task with frame-level confidence s...
- [Sport detection](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/ai-video-service/content-moderation/sport-detection.md): Detect sporting activities, actions, and events in videos using content moderation API with confidence scores and frame-level identification.

## Generate and translate captions
- [Generate and translate captions](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/video-hosting/ai-for-video/generate-ai-subtitles-and-add-them-to-video.md): Generate video captions and translate subtitles using Whisper ASR and AI models via Gcore API or Customer Portal for 100+ languages.
- [Generate and translate AI captions in the customer portal](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/ai-video-service/generate-ai-subtitles-and-add-them-to-video/generate-captions-in-customer-portal.md): Create AI caption generation and translation tasks in Gcore Customer Portal for MP4 videos via Streaming > AI, selecting audio language, subtitle language, a...
- [Generate and translate AI captions for VOD](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/ai-video-service/generate-ai-subtitles-and-add-them-to-video/generate-captions-via-api.md): Generate AI captions and translate subtitles for VOD videos using Video Streaming API or AI API with transcription and multi-language translation parameters.
- [Streaming usage and billing metrics](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/how-the-streaming-platform-and-additional-features-are-billed.md): Explanation of how streaming services and features are measured for billing

## Codecs and protocols
- [Accepted input parameters for live streams and videos](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streams-and-videos-protocols-and-codecs/input-parameters-and-codecs.md)
- [Output parameters after transcoding: codecs, bitrate, frame rate](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streams-and-videos-protocols-and-codecs/output-parameters-and-codecs.md)
- [RTMP](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/protocols/rtmp.md): Ingesting original streams via RTMP, RTMPS protocols
- [SRT](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/protocols/srt.md): Ingesting original streams via SRT protocol
- [WebRTC WHIP to HLS/DASH](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/protocols/webrtc.md): Ingest via WebRTC WHIP and transcoding to LL-HLS/LL-DASH
- [RTMP vs SRT: protocol comparison](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/protocols/rtmp-srt.md): Key differences of RTMP vs SRT, behavior on unstable networks, and guidance on choosing the right ingest protocol.

- [Built-in web player](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/extra-features/customize-appearance-of-the-built-in-player.md): Settings, customization and use by direct link
- [JS Video Player & SDK](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/api/player-api-tutorial.md): SDK of embeddable and customizable JS player for web
- [Video streaming API tutorial](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/api/streaming-platform-api-tutorial.md): Integrate Video Streaming API using post_streams, post_broadcasts, patch_streams, patch_broadcasts endpoints and webhooks for stream creation, broadcast mana...
- [Webhooks on system state changes](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/extra-features/get-webhooks-from-the-streaming-platform.md): Know about changing the status of Lives, VOD, and Restreams

## Interaction with CDN
- [Get started with CDN for video streaming](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/interaction-with-cdn/get-started-streaming-cdn.md): Configure integrated CDN delivery for Video Streaming with automatic caching across 210+ edge locations and per-minute billing without additional setup.
- [Use custom CDN resources with video streaming](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/interaction-with-cdn/custom-cdn-resource.md): Configure dedicated custom CDN resources with geo-blocking, IP restrictions, referrer validation, secure tokens, and per-GB billing for Video Streaming deliv...
- [Protect content with video secure tokens](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/interaction-with-cdn/video-secure-token.md): Implement video secure tokens to restrict access by user authentication, expiration time, and per-user tokens; use Custom CDN resource for geo-blocking, refe...
- [Auto-refresh video secure tokens](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/interaction-with-cdn/token-auto-refresh.md): Configure auto-refresh for short-lived video secure tokens (HLS/DASH) with IP-bound or plain modes to prevent link sharing during live streams and pay-per-vi...

## Live streaming
- [Getting started with live streaming](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/create-a-live-stream.md): Broadcast live video with RTMP, SRT, or WebRTC WHIP ingest; deliver adaptive bitrate playback via LL-HLS/LL-DASH with 2-3s latency, overlays, DVR, and restre...

## Broadcasting software
- [FFmpeg](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/broadcasting-software/ffmpeg.md): Configure FFmpeg command-line parameters (bitrate, encoder, keyframe interval, resolution, audio sample rate) to stream video to Gcore Video Streaming via RTMP.
- [GStreamer](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/broadcasting-software/gstreamer.md): Build GStreamer pipelines with videotestsrc, x264enc, and srtsink/rtmpsink to encode and push H.264/AAC streams to Gcore RTMP or SRT ingest endpoints.
- [Larix](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/broadcasting-software/larix.md): Configure Larix mobile encoder with RTMP URL, Larix Grove QR code, and stream parameters (bitrate, resolution, FPS, keyframe interval) for Gcore Video Stream...
- [Open Broadcaster Software](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/broadcasting-software/obs.md): Configure OBS encoder settings (Server URL, Stream Key, Video Bitrate, Audio Bitrate) to push RTMP live streams to Gcore Video Streaming platform.
- [Instant clips](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/clips.md): Creating instant video clips from a live stream
- [Pause and rewind the live streams](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/pause-and-rewind-the-live-streams.md): Enable DVR feature to cache live streams for 1-4 hours, allowing viewers to pause and rewind broadcasts using PATCH /streaming/streams/{id} API or UI toggle.
- [How low-latency streaming works](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/how-low-latency-streaming-works.md)
- [Combine multiple live streams](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/combine-multiple-live-streams.md): Combine multiple live streams into one player with multicamera feature, enabling viewers to switch between streams by angle, language, or content using playe...
- [Insert an overlay (HTML widgets) in your live stream](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/insert-html-overlays-in-live-streams.md): Embed HTML widgets as overlays into live streams using Gcore API with support for multiple overlays, transparent areas, and automatic scaling across adaptive...
- [Understanding of PTS and DTS in RTMP/SRT master streams](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/pts-dts.md): How invalid PTS/DTS timestamps in master streams affect transcoding, CDN delivery, and playback
- [Primary, Backup, and Global Ingest Points for PUSH and PULL](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/primary-backup.md): Multiple geo distributed ingest points and limits of getting original stream
- [Record your live streams and save them as videos](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/record-your-live-streams-and-save-them-as-videos.md): Record live streams manually or automatically via Gcore Customer Portal or API, storing video fragments in Streaming Storage with automatic splitting for int...
- [create-and-configure-a-restream-to-social-media](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/create-and-configure-a-restream-to-social-media.md)

## Q&A and Case studies
- [Streaming FAQs](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/faq/streaming-faq.md): Answers to common questions relating to Live and VOD Streaming
- [Case Study: Mastering 24/7 Live Streaming with Hot-Swapping](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/faq/case-study-hot-swapping-elemental.md): How to maintain 100% availability in complex broadcasting pipelines using multi-tier encoding and real-time monitoring with Elemental Live and Nimble Streamer
- [Video streaming HTTP status codes](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/faq/http-status-codes.md): Reference HTTP status codes (200, 403, 404, 422, 500, 502, 503, 504) returned by video streaming manifest and chunk requests, including CMAF X-Err-Code heade...
- [Live Streaming issues](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/faq/live-streaming-issues.md): Troubleshoot Live Streaming issues including DVR chunk retention, low-latency buffering, empty manifests, packet loss, and restream failures with encoder and...
- [VOD issues](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/faq/vod-issues.md): Troubleshoot VOD upload failures, transcoding errors, processing delays, and video delivery issues including 503 errors, session timeouts, stuck states, and ...

## WebRTC issues
- [Fix the camera or microphone if they do not work](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/faq/real-time-video-issues/fix-the-camera-or-microphone-if-they-do-not-work.md): Troubleshoot camera and microphone issues in video calls by verifying browser compatibility (Chrome 70+, Firefox 70+, Safari 12+, Edge 79+, Opera 60+) and en...
- [Audio quality is reduced when using bluetooth headsets in video call apps](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/faq/real-time-video-issues/audio-quality-is-reduced-when-using-bluetooth-headsets-in-video-call-apps.md): Bluetooth audio quality degrades in video calls because A2DP high-quality profile switches to low-quality HSP/HFP profile when microphone is needed.

## Statistics
- [Video player metrics](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/statistics/statistics-of-built-in-player.md): Monitor video playback analytics including average view duration, viewer geography, browsers, operating systems, hosts, and viewer count from Gcore Video Hos...
- [Video views and delivered minutes](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/statistics/statistics-of-views.md): Monitor video unique views and delivery minutes through Gcore CDN via Video Hosting Statistics tab in Customer Portal.
- [View your live stream metrics](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/statistics/view-your-live-stream-metrics.md): Monitor live stream performance metrics including video bitrate, FPS, and key frame interval via Live Stream Monitoring dashboard in Gcore Customer Portal.
- [View statistics of live streams and videos](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/statistics/view-statistics-of-live-streams-videos-and-billing.md): Access viewer analytics for VOD and live streams via Reports page with metrics on browsers, geography, OS, hosts, and unique viewers updated every five minutes.

## Video hosting

## Getting started VOD
- [Upload a video and embed it into your app](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/video-hosting/upload-a-video-and-embed-it-to-your-app.md): Upload videos via direct upload, Google Drive, TUS protocol, or remote URLs; transcode to HLS, DASH, MP4; embed player with adaptive bitrate, multi-audio, su...
- [Organize uploaded videos](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/video-hosting/organize-uploaded-videos.md): Organize videos in Gcore Streaming using directories and tags for flexible grouping without losing existing folder structure.
- [Delete uploaded videos](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/video-hosting/delete-videos.md): Delete uploaded videos via Gcore Customer Portal or DELETE /videos API endpoint; permanently removes video data, transcoded versions, subtitles, and screensh...
- [Download files](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/video-hosting/original-files.md): This article explains the storage and capability to download transcoded versions
- [Protect your videos with the AES-128 encryption](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/video-hosting/protect-your-videos-with-the-aes-128-encryption.md): Enable AES-128 encryption for HLS video delivery by configuring a keyserver to manage decryption key distribution via Gcore API integration.
- [HEVC, AV1, and VP9 multi-codec VOD](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/video-hosting/multi-codec.md)
- [HLS, MPEG-DASH, and MP4](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/video-hosting/hls-and-mp4.md)
- [Create an illusion of a live broadcast with uploaded videos](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/video-hosting/create-an-illusion-of-a-live-broadcast-with-uploaded-videos.md): Configure Live imitation to broadcast uploaded videos at scheduled times with iframe player embedding and playlist sequencing.
- [Videos with multiple audio tracks](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/video-hosting/multi-audio.md): Playing videos with multiple audio tracks in different languages
- [Create and configure playlists for videos](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/video-hosting/create-and-configure-playlists-for-videos.md): Create playlists containing up to 512 videos, configure playback order, and embed playlist code on websites via Gcore Streaming portal.
- [Video Lifecycle and Statuses](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/video-hosting/vod-status.md): Understanding Video Transcoding and Processing Statuses
- [Subtitles and closed captions for VOD](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/video-hosting/subtitles-and-closed-captions-for-vod.md): Configure subtitles and closed captions for VOD using SRT and WebVTT formats with Gcore Player's timed text tracks.
- [Timeline hover previews: use with players and Roku devices](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/video-hosting/timeline-hover-previews-use-in-players-and-roku-devices.md): Enable timeline hover previews (trick play) with storyboard tiles in Gcore Player, WebVTT format, and Roku HLS/DASH manifests for video scrubbing.
- [Upload video via API to VOD storage](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/video-hosting/upload-video-via-api.md): Upload videos to Gcore VOD storage via API using copy from external storage, local device upload, or batch migration methods with HLS/MP4 transcoding.
